dialogos.texto_en: (The fact is, I made a mistake with\n my confession target.)
(That greatly turned the atmosphere\n between me and the quintuplets\n into an incredibly awkward one.)
(Even after everyone returned to the hotel,\n not a single person mentioned what happened.\n It was as if it had never occured.)
(After the last night of the graduation trip passed,\n we boarded the plane home,\n with a lingering uncomfortable atmosphere.)
(In this graduation trip, I have\n betrayed the trust I had built up.)
(What will happen to the relationship\n between them and I\n from now on?)
(Is it going to stay like this?\n Can it still change?\n Or%p-2;――%p;)
(The answer to that is shrouded in mist.)
